Privacy.metaDescription: How Xten Partners processes personal data on this website (GDPR-oriented framework).
Privacy.title: Privacy policy

sections.heading: 1. Data controller
sections.body: Xten Partners (“we”) is the controller for the processing described here for data collected through this website. Full contact details: [to complete — legal name, address, DPO or privacy contact].

sections.heading: 2. Data collected
sections.body: We collect information you voluntarily submit via the contact form: name, work email, organization, role, and message content. Minimal technical logs may be retained by our hosting provider for security purposes.

sections.heading: 3. Purposes and legal bases
sections.body: Data is processed to respond to your inquiry (pre-contractual measures / legitimate interest in a B2B context). No broad commercial prospecting is conducted without a separate legal basis.

sections.heading: 4. Retention
sections.body: Messages are kept only as long as needed to handle the request and meet legal obligations, then deleted or anonymized according to internal procedures.

sections.heading: 5. Recipients
sections.body: Data is accessible to authorized personnel at Xten Partners and, where applicable, technical subprocessors (hosting, email) bound by confidentiality and security obligations.

sections.heading: 6. International transfers
sections.body: If transfers outside the EU occur, they rely on EU Commission standard contractual clauses or an equivalent mechanism.

sections.heading: 7. Your rights
sections.body: You have rights of access, rectification, erasure, restriction, objection, and portability as provided under the GDPR. You may lodge a complaint with your supervisory authority.

sections.heading: 8. Cookies
sections.body: Only cookies strictly necessary for site operation are set by default. Any additional analytics will be enabled only with explicit consent where required.

Terms.metaDescription: Legal notices and terms of use for the Xten Partners website.
Terms.title: Legal notices

sections.heading: 1. Publisher
sections.body: [To complete — legal name, corporate form, registered office, registration numbers, VAT ID, legal representative.]

sections.heading: 2. Hosting
sections.body: The site is hosted on Vercel Inc. infrastructure with industry-standard security practices. Subprocessors may change; an updated list is available on request.

sections.heading: 3. Intellectual property
sections.body: Content (text, structure, visual elements) is protected. Unauthorized reproduction is prohibited except as allowed by law.

sections.heading: 4. Use of the site
sections.body: Use is intended in a professional context. You agree not to compromise site security or submit unlawful content through forms.

sections.heading: 5. Limitation of liability
sections.body: Information is provided for general orientation. It does not constitute legal, tax, or financial advice. Xten Partners is not liable for decisions based solely on this content.

sections.heading: 6. Governing law
sections.body: These notices are governed by [to specify] law. Disputes fall under the jurisdiction of [to specify], subject to mandatory rules of public policy.
